::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
## Work in preparation or submitted (newest on top)

- Nüst et al. **Reproducibility in Research using Geospatial Data**. *Chapter in prep to [Handbook for Reproduction and Replication Studies](https://forrt.org/replication_handbook/)* (May 2026)

- Scheider, S., et al. **GIScience as a meta-science: Adding the missing theory to our geo-information practice**. *In prep for [JOSIS](https://josis.org/index.php/josis)* (End Mar 2026)

- Leonardo Monteiro-Fialho et al. **First Steps Towards an Open-Source Framework to Support Public Transport Data Management**. *Accepted to [GISTAM 2026](https://gistam.scitevents.org/)* (24 Feb 2026)

- Iratxe Alonso-Olea, Patricia Gual-Montolio, Laura Díaz-Sanahuja, Lucas Niño-Ruiz, Adriana Mira, Sven Casteleyn, Carlos Granell, Azucena García-Palacios, Juana María Bretón-López. **Maximizing the efficacy of in vivo exposure therapy using smartphone-assisted just-in-time adaptive intervention for anxiety disorders: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial**. *Submitted to [BMJ Open](https://bmjopen.bmj.com/)* (20 Jan 2026)

- Granell, C. et al. **Longitudinal assessment of research in GIScience domain shows a positive impact of reproducible research practices**. *Submitted to [JOSIS](https://josis.org/index.php/josis)* (3 Dec 2025). Preprint on EarthArXiv, [10.31223/X5RJ3W](https://doi.org/10.31223/X5RJ3W). Prereg study below

  - Nüst, D., Granell, C., & Ostermann, F. O. **Impact of reproducible paper guidelines on computational papers: A longitudinal study on the AGILE and GIScience conference series**. *OSF Preregistered study*, [OSF.IO/XZJCH](https://doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/XZJCH) (24 Jul 2023)

- Alberto González-Pérez, Juana Bretón-López, Carlos Granell, Jorge Osma, Lucas Niño-Ruiz, Javier Herrero-González, Miguel Matey-Sanz, Iratxe Alonso Olea, Laura Díaz-Sanahuja, Sven Casteleyn. **Driving a geolocation-based app for self-guided in-vivo exposure therapy towards an RCT through a qualitative evaluation**. *Submitted to [Intelligent Medicine](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/intelligent-medicine)* (27 Jun 2025)

- Miguel Matey-Sanz, Joaquín Torres-Sospedra, Sven Casteleyn, Carlos Granell. **A Study on Training Set Size and Model Performance in Smartphone- and Smartwatch-Based Human Activity Recognition**. *Submitted to [IEEE Transactions on Human-Machine System](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=6221037)* (End Aug 2025)

- Flavio Vata, Marco Octávio Painho, Ana Cristina Costa, Carlos Granell. **An Integrated Framework to Assess Social Inequity and Flood Susceptibility: A Case Study of Harris County, Texas**. *Submitted to [Climate Risk Management](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/climate-risk-management)* (10 Nov 2025)

:::

## Authored/edited books and special issues

- Alexander Kotsev, Marco Minguini, Massimo Craglia, Stefano Nativi, Carlos Granell (Guest editors). **Special Issue [A European Approach to the Establishment of Data Spaces](https://www.mdpi.com/journal/data/special_issues/EU_DataSpaces)**. *Data*, 2022. MDPI AG, ISSN 2306-5729.

- Granell C., Mooney P., Jirka S., Rieke M., Ostermann F., van den Broecke J., Sarretta A., Verhulst S., Dencik L., Oost H., Micheli M., Minghini M., Kotsev A., Schade S. **Emerging approaches for data-driven innovation in Europe: Sandbox experiments on the governance of data and technology**. EUR 30969 EN, Publications Office of the European Union, Luxembourg, 2022, ISBN 978-92-76-46936-0, JRC127730, doi:[10.2760/511775](http://dx.doi.org/10.2760/511775). [[OA]](https://publications.jrc.ec.europa.eu/repository/handle/JRC127730) [[Repositori UJI]](http://hdl.handle.net/10234/197094)

- Carlos Granell (Guest editor). **Special Issue [Spatial Stream Processing](http://www.mdpi.com/journal/ijgi/special_issues/Spatial_Stream_Processing)**. *ISPRS International Journal of Geo-Information*, 2018. MDPI AG, ISSN 2220-9964.

- Barbara Hofer, Carlos Granell, Lars Bernard (Guest editors). **Special Issue [Innovation in Geoprocessing for a Digital Earth](https://doi.org/10.1080/17538947.2017.1379154)**. *International Journal of Digital Earth*, 11(1), 2018. Taylor & Francis, ISSN 1753-8947.

- Carlos Granell, Sven Casteleyn, Angela Schwering (Guest editors). **Special Issue [Geospatial applications, tools and location-based services for education](http://www.mdpi.com/journal/ijgi/special_issues/geospatial_education)**. *ISPRS International Journal of Geo-Information*, 2017. MDPI AG, ISSN 2220-9964.

- C. Granell, C. Moreno (editors). **Special issue in 'Innovación Abierta'**. *Novática*, num. 233, 2015. ATI, ISSN 0211-2124.

- Carlos Granell, Sven Casteleyn, Clement Atzberger (Guest editors). **Research Topic [Geospatial data capturing, processing, analysis and visualization in Agro-Geoinformatics](http://journal.frontiersin.org/researchtopic/3272/geospatial-data-capturing-processing-analysis-and-visualization-in-agro-geoinformatics)**. *Frontiers in Environmental Science (Environmental Informatics Section)*, 2015. Frontiers, ISSN 2296-665X.

- E. Aguilar-Moreno, C. Granell-Canut. **Geobibliotecas**. Barcelona: Editorial UOC, *Colección El profesional de la información*, n. 30, 2015, ISBN 978-84-9064-581-9. [[publisher]](http://www.editorialuoc.cat/geobibliotecas-p-1665.html?language=es&cPath=1).
